textByHashes.b757423fd6122f457f0a6bc09fadcd1705e99f81: Because they drop bones which I am going to use to train my prayer. The meat is also a nice addition.
textByHashes.2eed9471691e419733af9eaf25a6a192bde320df: And then go to Wintertodt? I do that every time I make an Iron person account. About time I try something new.
textByHashes.dfd6b6506719ac5d8f0ab7407cdc2438c0133106: No, maybe I should go get a slayer task now you mention it. Thanks for the reminder.
textByHashes.31ee40e3f2e6ad17caeaa7aab4bc86cb7b2ee74b: You can only trade with people in your group.
